The current merged results only show placeholder strings for all URLs and a planned exploration path, not actual pages or citations. To proceed, I will perform a live search to locate a climate-change news article that explicitly links to one scientific paper, one government policy document, and one organization position statement, then visit each real URL to extract content, summarize, and relate them back to the anchor article. I will document the exact exploration path, including the sequence of opened pages with timestamps and rationale for each source. If you’d like me to proceed, I will initiate targeted searches to identify a suitable anchor article and its linked sources, then return a fully sourced report with URLs, summaries, and the connection to the original article.
